marisa-stand-light-punch.name: Standing Light Punch
marisa-stand-light-punch.notes_sc: Good neutral buffer into 5LP~LP Target Combo (requires at least a Counter-hit to combo); causes air reset if juggled into

marisa-stand-medium-punch.name: Standing Medium Punch
notes: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses
marisa-stand-medium-punch.notes_sc: 2f extra recovery on whiff; great hitbox and a strong buffer into 5MP~MP Target Combo

marisa-stand-heavy-punch.name: Standing Heavy Punch
notes: Hold the button for more than 21 frames to change its properties
marisa-stand-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Can hold button 21f for improved properties; strong whiff punish tool

marisa-stand-heavy-punch-charged.name: Standing Heavy Punch (Charged)
notes: Forces a juggle state knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
15 frames of advantage added when the attack lands as a Punish Counter.
1 frames of recovery added on hit or when blocked

marisa-stand-light-kick.name: Standing Light Kick
marisa-stand-light-kick.notes_sc: At farther ranges, can only combo into SA2; special cancel is delayed until after 2nd recovery frame; DR cancel is delayed until after 3rd recovery frame

marisa-stand-medium-kick.name: Standing Medium Kick
marisa-stand-medium-kick.notes_sc: Good poke and Drive Rush starter

marisa-stand-heavy-kick.name: Standing Heavy Kick
notes: Hold the button for more than 17 frames to change its properties
Forces a juggle state knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
Forces a juggle state knockdown when the attack lands for a Punish Counter
marisa-stand-heavy-kick.notes_sc: Can hold button 17f for improved properties; solid poke with good hitbox priority; Punish Counter puts opponent into free juggle state; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles

marisa-stand-heavy-kick-charged.name: Standing Heavy Kick (Charged)
notes: Increase juggle state time when attack lands as a Punish Counter

marisa-crouch-light-punch.name: Crouching Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled
marisa-crouch-light-punch.notes_sc: Chains into 2LP/2LK; Marisa's only 4f normal; special cancel is delayed until after active frames; DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd recovery frame

marisa-crouch-medium-punch.name: Crouching Medium Punch
marisa-crouch-medium-punch.notes_sc: Long range for a cancelable 2MP (but slower than average startup); topmost hurtboxes on frames 8-15 are projectile invincible (avoids Sagat's MP/HP Tiger Shot)

marisa-crouch-heavy-punch.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
notes: Hold the button for more than 17 frames to change its properties
marisa-crouch-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Can hold button 17f for improved properties; slow but solid anti-air; cannot hit cross-up; only first 2 active frames hit grounded opponents; active frames 3-5 only hit airborne opponents; puts opponent into limited juggle state on hit (higher launch vs. airborne, and much higher on Punish Counter)

marisa-crouch-light-kick.name: Crouching Light Kick
notes: Can be rapid canceled

marisa-crouch-medium-kick.name: Crouching Medium Kick
marisa-crouch-medium-kick.notes_sc: 1f extra recovery on whiff/block; solid low poke with good range and hitbox priority; strong Drive Rush starter that links into 4HP or 5MP~MP at close range, 2MP at mid range, or 6MP from farther out; topmost hurtboxes on frames 9-16 are projectile invincible (avoids Sagat's MP/HP Tiger Shot but becomes vulnerable on frame 17~)

marisa-crouch-heavy-kick.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
notes: Hold the button for more than 20 frames to change its properties
Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

marisa-crouch-heavy-kick-charged.name: Crouching Heavy Kick (Charged)
notes: Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
3 frames of recovery added on hit or when blocked

marisa-jump-medium-punch.name: Jumping Medium Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
marisa-jump-medium-punch.notes_sc: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; lower body projectile invuln 7-21f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

marisa-jump-heavy-punch.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
notes: Hold the button for more than 20 frames to change its properties
Produces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
marisa-jump-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Can hold button 20f for improved properties; causes spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents; lower body projectile invuln 9-23f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

marisa-jump-light-kick.name: Jumping Light Kick
notes: Has cross-up attack properties
marisa-jump-light-kick.notes_sc: Cross-up; useful for safe jumps; can be used as a fuzzy instant overhead

marisa-jump-medium-kick.name: Jumping Medium Kick
marisa-jump-medium-kick.notes_sc: Farthest reaching horizontal jump-in with good hitbox priority; lower body projectile invuln 8-25f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

marisa-jump-heavy-kick.name: Jumping Heavy Kick
notes: Hold down the button for over 20 frames to change its properties
marisa-jump-heavy-kick.notes_sc: Can hold button 20f for improved properties; lower body projectile invuln 10-21f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

light-two-hitter.name: Light Two Hitter
notes: A rapid series of attacks
light-two-hitter.notes_sc: Requires Counter-hit, Punish Counter, or Drive Rush 5LP to combo; 3f gap on block between hits that allows for a frame trap

medium-two-hitter.name: Medium Two Hitter
notes: A two-hit combination attack that can be canceled into special moves
medium-two-hitter.notes_sc: Great pressure and bully tool from 5MP; true blockstring between hits; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 1st recovery frame

heavy-two-hitter.name: Heavy Two Hitter
notes: A two-hit combination attack that allows you to move first even if blocked
heavy-two-hitter.notes_sc: () refers to scaled damage after 5HP combo starter; 6f gap between hits on block (1f gap if starting from 5[HP]); grants a safe jump near the corner on a grounded hit or low-height juggle

volare-combo.name: Volare Combo
notes: A series of attacks performed while jumping

caelum-arc.name: Caelum Arc
notes: A move with an area of attack so wide that it can even hit opponents who are behind you
Hold down the button for over 20 frames to change its properties
Produces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
Has cross-up attack properties
caelum-arc.notes_sc: Can hit Cross-up; can hold button 20f for improved properties; causes spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents; lower body projectile invuln 9f until land except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

caelum-arc-charged.name: Caelum Arc (Charged)
caelum-arc-charged.name_ja: カエルムアーク (ホールド)
notes: A move with an area of attack so wide that it can even hit opponents who are behind you
Has cross-up attack properties

magna-bunker.name: Magna Bunker
notes: A forward-moving attack that can be canceled into special moves
Hold down the button for over 17 frames to change its properties
3 frames of recovery added if the attack misses
magna-bunker.notes_sc: 3f extra recovery on whiff; can hold button 17f for improved properties; causes air reset when juggled into without Drive Rush; short range but important in combos and pressure; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd recovery frame

magna-bunker-charged.name: Magna Bunker (Charged)
magna-bunker-charged.name_ja: マグナバンカー (ホールド)
notes: A forward-moving attack that can be canceled into special moves
6 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

novacula-swipe.name: Novacula Swipe
notes: A two-hit combination attack that can knock an opponent down
novacula-swipe.notes_sc: Low follow-up; true blockstring from 6MP, so an opponent mashing a crouching button after blocked 6MP will not be frame trapped; useful confirm if 6MP hits crouching opponent

novacula-thrust.name: Novacula Thrust
notes: A combination attack that hits twice against standing opponents
Can be canceled into a Super Art
Does not hit crouching opponents
novacula-thrust.notes_sc: Whiffs on crouching opponents; if the opponent is standing, this ender is preferable for its corner carry and Super cancelability; Super cancel is delayed until after 3rd active frame

malleus-breake-1.name: Malleus Breaker (1)
notes: A two-hit combination attack that cannot be blocked crouching
Hold down the button for over 17 frames to change its properties
Produces a floor bound when hitting a mid-air opponent

malleus-breake-1-charged.name: Malleus Breaker (1 Charged)
malleus-breake-1-charged.name_ja: マレウスビート（1段目 ホールド）
notes: A two-hit combination attack that cannot be blocked crouching
Adds a floor bounding effect during a mid-air hit

malleus-breake-2.name: Malleus Breaker (2)
notes: A two-hit combination attack that cannot be blocked crouching

falx-crusher-1.name: Falx Crusher (1)
falx-crusher-1.name_ja: ファルクスクラッシュ（1段目）
notes: Forces the opponent into a standing position
Hold the button for more than 21 frames to change its properties

falx-crusher-1-charged.name: Falx Crusher (1 Charged)
falx-crusher-1-charged.name_ja: ファルクスクラッシュ（1段目 ホールド）
notes: Forces the opponent into a standing position
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

falx-crusher-2.name: Falx Crusher (2)
falx-crusher-2.name_ja: ファルクスクラッシュ（2段目）
notes: A two-hit combination attack with long reach

gladius-light.name: Gladius (Light)
notes: A devastating straight punch. Can be powered up by holding the attack button
Hold down the button for over 26 frames to change its properties
Upper body has Super Armor for 1 hit from frames 5 - 10

gladius-light-charged.name: Gladius (Light Charged)
gladius-light-charged.name_ja: グラディウス（弱 ホールド）
notes: Upper body has Super Armor for 1 hit from frames 5 - 26
Has armor break properties

gladius-medium.name: Gladius (Medium)
notes: A devastating straight punch. Can be powered up by holding the attack button
Hold down the button for over 29 frames to change its properties
Upper body has Super Armor for 1 hit from frames 5 - 12

gladius-medium-charged.name: Gladius (Medium Charged)
gladius-medium-charged.name_ja: グラディウス（中 ホールド）
notes: Upper body has Super Armor for 1 hit from frames 5 - 29
Has armor break properties

gladius-heavy.name: Gladius (Heavy)
notes: A devastating straight punch. Can be powered up by holding the attack button
Hold down the button for over 35 frames to change its properties
Upper body has Super Armor for 1 hit from frames 5 - 15

gladius-heavy-charged.name: Gladius (Heavy Charged)
gladius-heavy-charged.name_ja: グラディウス（大 ホールド）
notes: A devastating straight punch. Can be powered up by holding the attack button
Upper body has Super Armor for 1 hit from frames 5 - 35
Has armor break properties

gladius-od.name: Gladius (OD)
notes: A devastating straight punch. Can be powered up by holding the attack button
Hold down the button for over 29 frames to change its properties
Upper body has Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 22
Has armor break properties

gladius-od-charged.name: Gladius (OD Charged)
gladius-od-charged.name_ja: グラディウス（OD ホールド）
notes: Upper body has Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 38
Has armor break properties

dimachaerus-light-1.name: Dimachaerus (Light 1)
dimachaerus-light-1.name_ja: ディマカイルス（弱 1段目）
notes: An uppercut with a wide swing followed by a second punch that slams an opponent to the ground. Useful when used out of normal or unique attacks to create combos
Hold down the button for over 35 frames to change its properties
Can transition to branching attacks from frames 22 - 32

dimachaerus-light-2.name: Dimachaerus (Light 2)
dimachaerus-light-2.name_ja: ディマカイルス（弱 2段目）
notes: An uppercut with a wide swing followed by a second punch that slams an opponent to the ground. Useful when used out of normal or unique attacks to create combos

dimachaerus-medium-1.name: Dimachaerus (Medium 1)
dimachaerus-medium-1.name_ja: ディマカイルス（中 1段目）
notes: An uppercut with a wide swing followed by a second punch that slams an opponent to the ground. Useful when used out of normal or unique attacks to create combos
Can transition to branching attacks from frames 27 - 36

dimachaerus-medium-2.name: Dimachaerus (Medium 2)
dimachaerus-medium-2.name_ja: ディマカイルス（中 2段目）
notes: An uppercut with a wide swing followed by a second punch that slams an opponent to the ground. Useful when used out of normal or unique attacks to create combos

dimachaerus-heavy-1.name: Dimachaerus (Heavy 1)
dimachaerus-heavy-1.name_ja: ディマカイルス（大 1段目）
notes: An uppercut with a wide swing followed by a second punch that slams an opponent to the ground. Useful when used out of normal or unique attacks to create combos
Can transition to branching attacks from frames 35 - 42

dimachaerus-heavy-2.name: Dimachaerus (Heavy 2)
dimachaerus-heavy-2.name_ja: ディマカイルス（大 2段目）
notes: An uppercut with a wide swing followed by a second punch that slams an opponent to the ground. Useful when used out of normal or unique attacks to create combos

dimachaerus-od-1.name: Dimachaerus (OD 1)
notes: An uppercut with a wide swing followed by a second punch that slams an opponent to the ground. Useful when used out of normal or unique attacks to create combos
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 5 - 19
Can transition to branching attacks from frames 31 - 39
Has armor break properties

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 5 - 19

dimachaerus-od-2.name: Dimachaerus (OD 2)
notes: An uppercut with a wide swing followed by a second punch that slams an opponent to the ground. Useful when used out of normal or unique attacks to create combos

phalanx-light.name: Phalanx (Light)
notes: Leap into the air and come down with a powerful downward punch. Allows you to move first even if it is blocked, making it effective for continuing offensive pressure
Upper body has Super Armor from frames 7 - 11
Invincible to projectiles from frames 12 - 27
Considered airborne from frames 11 - 29

phalanx-medium.name: Phalanx (Medium)
notes: Leap into the air and come down with a powerful downward punch. Allows you to move first even if it is blocked, making it effective for continuing offensive pressure
Upper body has Super Armor for 1 hit from frames 7 - 13
Lower body is invincible to projectiles from frames 12 - 30
Considered airborne from frames 14 - 32

invuln.projectile: Lower body is invincible to projectiles from frames 12 - 30

phalanx-heavy.name: Phalanx (Heavy)
notes: Leap into the air and come down with a powerful downward punch. Allows you to move first even if it is blocked, making it effective for continuing offensive pressure
Upper body has Super Armor from frames 10 - 15
Invincible to projectiles from frames 12 - 34
Considered airborne from frames 17 - 36

phalanx-od.name: Phalanx (OD)
notes: Leap into the air and come down with a powerful downward punch. Allows you to move first even if it is blocked, making it effective for continuing offensive pressure
Upper body has Super Armor from frames 6 - 12
Invincible to projectiles from frames 12 - 30
Considered airborne from frames 14 - 32
Produces a wall splat if the opponent reaches the wall
Has armor break properties

quadriga-light.name: Quadriga (Light)
notes: Hop forward with a powerful front kick. Useful as a surprise attack that allows you to close the distance with your opponent, and can also be used to tack on additional hits in combos

quadriga-medium.name: Quadriga (Medium)
notes: Hop forward with a powerful front kick. Useful as a surprise attack that allows you to close the distance with your opponent, and can also be used to tack on additional hits in combos

quadriga-heavy.name: Quadriga (Heavy)
notes: Hop forward with a powerful front kick. Useful as a surprise attack that allows you to close the distance with your opponent, and can also be used to tack on additional hits in combos

quadriga-od.name: Quadriga (OD)
notes: Hop forward with a powerful front kick. Useful as a surprise attack that allows you to close the distance with your opponent, and can also be used to tack on additional hits in combos
Produces a wall splat on hit

scutum.name: Scutum
notes: A defensive maneuver in which you cover your head with both arms, giving armor to your upper body and automatically countering your opponent's attacks if hit. If you continue holding the button following a counter, you will return to the Scutum stance
Upper body has Super Armor for 1 hit from frames 3 - 28
Automatically transitions into a special attack when the Super Armor absorbs the opponent’s attack
Can transition to branching attacks from frames 9 - 14
Hold down the button to extend the technique
scutum.notes_sc: Stance with 2-hit full-body armor can be extended an extra 30f by holding a kick button, followed by 29 unarmored recovery frames; cancelable into follow-ups after 8f; stance cannot be canceled into from other attacks; absorbing an attack automatically triggers counterattack follow-up; Marisa takes a fixed 6f hitstop when absorbing attacks (causing the counterattack to often land as a Counter-hit rather than a Punish Counter against medium/heavy attacks)

scutum-physical-counter.name: Scutum (Physical Counter)
scutum-physical-counter.name_ja: スクトゥム（当身派生版）
notes: Take an attack during Scutum
Always in Punish Counter state during execution
Scutum stance continues while the button is held

scutum-od.name: Scutum (OD)
notes: A defensive maneuver in which you cover your head with both arms, giving armor to your upper body and automatically countering your opponent's attacks if hit. If you continue holding the button following a counter, you will return to the Scutum stance
Upper body has Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 28
Automatically transitions into a special attack when the Super Armor absorbs the opponent’s attack
Can transition to branching attacks from frames 9 - 14
Hold down the button to extend the technique

scutum-od-physical-counter.name: Scutum (OD Physical Counter)
scutum-od-physical-counter.name_ja: スクトゥム（OD 当身派生版）
notes: Take an attack during OD Scutum
Always in Punish Counter state during execution
Scutum stance continues while the button is held

tonitrus-1.name: Tonitrus (1)
notes: During Scutum
A two-hit attack that can be performed from Scutum. The first hit is an overhead attack that cannot be blocked crouching, making it useful for penetrating defenses
Always in Punish Counter state during execution
2 frames of recovery added if the attack misses
Can transition to branching attacks on hit or block

tonitrus-2.name: Tonitrus (2)
notes: During Scutum
A two-hit attack that can be performed from Scutum. The first hit is an overhead attack that cannot be blocked crouching, making it useful for penetrating defenses
Always in Punish Counter state during execution

procella.name: Procella
notes: During Scutum
A sweeping kick that can be performed from Scutum. It is a low attack with long reach that cannot be blocked standing, making it useful for surprise attacks
Always in Punish Counter state during execution
procella.notes_sc: Risky low ender; may catch opponent by surprise since the overhead ender is safe on block; Marisa is in a Punish Counter state for entire duration; range includes 0.218 forward movement from 214K startup

enfold.name: Enfold
notes: During scutum

A throw that can be performed from Scutum. Pin your opponent to the ground and pound them with a single powerful punch. Useful as a way to break through the guard of an opponent who is expecting Scutum to be followed by a punch or kick
Always in Punish Counter state during execution
With Classic Controls
Does 2875 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
With Modern Controls
Does 2300 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
enfold.notes_sc: Marisa is in a Punish Counter state for entire duration; Range: 1.109 (final active frame: 1.164); range includes 0.218 forward movement from 214K startup

javelin-of-marisa.name: Javelin of Marisa
notes: Bring a full-power punch down on your opponent with a wide swing. Hold the button to increase its damage
Hold down the button for over 27 frames to change its properties
Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 23
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
javelin-of-marisa.notes_sc: Automatically triggers counterattack after Held SA1 armor absorbs a strike or throw on frames 1-27; can be baited with safe jump timing

javelin-of-marisa-charged.name: Javelin of Marisa (Charged)
javelin-of-marisa-charged.name_ja: マリーザジャベリン（ホールド）
notes: Bring a full-power punch down on your opponent with a wide swing. Hold the button to increase its damage
Transitions to attack when hit by an opponent’s attack between frames 1 - 27
Upper body has Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 28 - 47
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Properties change to the following if the attack lands on frames 46 - 47
- Damage is 2600
- Does not go into full cinematic animation

javelin-of-marisa-physical-counter.name: Javelin of Marisa (Physical Counter)
javelin-of-marisa-physical-counter.name_ja: マリーザジャベリン（当身派生版）
notes: Bring a full-power punch down on your opponent with a wide swing. Hold the button to increase its damage
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 10

meteorite.name: Meteorite
notes: Leap into the air with a tackle and descend with a single devastating punch. Useful as an anti-air attack or as a way to tack on big damage at the end of a combo
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 15
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%
Considered airborne from frames 16 - 48
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Properties change to the following if the attack lands between frames 49 - 51
- Damage is 2500
- Does not go into full cinematic animation
meteorite.notes_sc: Useful anti-air, reversal, and juggle ender; can be steered by holding forward/back; this affects the range, allowing you to hold back for close anti-airs or hold forward in ranged juggles or fireball punishes; upward hit triggers a cinematic; on block/whiff, ends with a downward slam that does 500 less damage than the cinematic version (still does full Drive Damage on hit); Marisa's collision box extends far downward, preventing opponent from walking or dashing underneath (opponent can still jump to avoid 2nd hit)

goddess-of-the-hunt.name: Goddess of the Hunt
notes: After sending your opponent to their knees with a vicious tackle, hit them with a devastating punch that sends them flying against the wall. A versatile move that can counter projectiles, be used in combos, and can turn the tables when under pressure
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 19
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
goddess-of-the-hunt.notes_sc: Takes opponent to corner; cinematic time regenerates ~2.1 Drive bars for Marisa; excellent whiff punish and projectile counter tool (especially with Modern controls)

goddess-of-the-hunt-ca.name: Goddess of the Hunt (Critical Art)
notes: When under 25% vitality

After sending your opponent to their knees with a vicious tackle, hit them with a devastating punch that sends them flying against the wall. A versatile move that can counter projectiles, be used in combos, and can turn the tables when under pressure
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 19
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%

mounted-grace.name: Mounted Grace
mounted-grace.name_ja: マウンテッドグレイス
notes: When near opponent
Grab an opponent by the leg to send them tumbling to the ground, and punch them from above. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
mounted-grace.notes_sc: Can use Drive Rush for a corner throw loop with 2f timing on standard characters; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

ponte-milvio.name: Ponte Milvio
notes: When near opponent
Lift an opponent up on your shoulders and then toss them behind you. Throws your opponent while switching places with them
ponte-milvio.notes_sc: Side switch; after throwing opponent into corner, can Drive Rush for strong strike/throw mixup; DR~5[HP] trades with reversal 4f normals for a high-damage trade combo; meaty options are much weaker after normal dash (no throw, limited conversions on hit); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously
